command:
echo '=== WP-2: 3090/qwen3-coder:30b assessing modified tracked files ==='
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/wp2_prompt.txt
curl -s -X POST http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/chat   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -d "$(python3 -c "
import json
prompt = open('/tmp/wp2_prompt.txt').read()
print(json.dumps({'model':'qwen3-coder:30b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':prompt}],'stream':False,'options':{'temperature':0.1}}))
")" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
content = d.get('message',{}).get('content','')
print('MODEL:', d.get('model'))
print('EVAL:', d.get('eval_count'), 'tokens in', round(d.get('total_duration',0)/1e9,1),'s')
print('RESULT:')
print(content)
" 2>&1
echo DONE_1927
